description: cert-manager monitoring dashboard for tracking certificate lifecycle, issuance, renewal, and controller health via Prometheus metrics.
title: cert-manager Monitoring

widgets.description: Number of certificates in Ready state. A value lower than total certificates indicates issuance problems.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND condition = 'True'

widgets.title: Certificates Ready

widgets.description: Certificates not in Ready state. Any value above zero requires investigation.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND condition = 'False'

widgets.title: Certificates Not Ready

widgets.description: Ready status per certificate over time. Useful for spotting certificates that flip between ready and not-ready.
widgets.title: Certificate Ready Status

widgets.description: Whether this cert-manager instance is the active leader. Only the leader processes certificate requests.
widgets.title: Leader Election Status

widgets.description: Unix timestamp when each certificate expires. Certificates expiring soon appear as lower values.
widgets.title: Certificate Expiration Time

widgets.description: Certificate request objects in Ready state, indicating successful issuance.
widgets.title: Certificate Requests Ready

widgets.description: Rate of controller sync operations. Spikes indicate cert-manager is actively processing certificate changes.
widgets.title: Controller Sync Rate

widgets.description: Scheduled renewal time for each certificate. Certificates renew when this timestamp is reached.
widgets.title: Renewal Timestamp

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP requests to ACME providers (e.g., Let's Encrypt) for certificate operations.
widgets.title: ACME Client Request Rate

widgets.description: Response time from ACME providers. High latency may delay certificate issuance and renewal.
widgets.title: ACME Client Latency

widgets.description: Rate of failed ACME client requests. Non-2xx responses indicate provider-side issues or rate limiting.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND status >= '400'

widgets.title: ACME Errors

widgets.description: Rate of failed webhook validation requests. Webhook failures can block certificate issuance.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND service.name = $service.name AND status >= '400'

widgets.title: Webhook Errors

widgets.description: Number of items waiting in the controller work queue. A growing queue indicates processing bottleneck.
widgets.title: Work Queue Depth

widgets.description: CPU time consumed by the cert-manager process.
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Resident memory (RSS) used by the cert-manager process.
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Number of active Go goroutines. A sustained increase may indicate a goroutine leak.
widgets.title: Goroutines

widgets.description: Rate of requests from cert-manager to the Kubernetes API server.
widgets.title: Kubernetes API Request Rate

widgets.description: Rate of incoming webhook validation and mutation requests.
widgets.title: Webhook Request Rate

widgets.description: Response time for webhook validation requests. High latency impacts Kubernetes resource creation.
widgets.title: Webhook Latency

widgets.description: Rate of items being added to controller work queues.
widgets.title: Work Queue Processing Rate
